summary: 現HEAD af070b8ではStory・Architecture・17 clauses・実装・テストが整合し、旧canonical-source-root-symlink-mismatchは解消されている。必須のregression_guardとpath_surface_coverageにも新しいblocking findingはない。

src/guarded-run-session.js:410-449 resolves caller/source identities first and passes caller.root_realpath or source.root_realpath into normalizeManagedBinding; lines 538-571 compare canonical caller/source roots and rebuild source_fallback fingerprints from the canonical authority root

judgment_delta: Initial concern: the previous review reproduced a valid source alias being rejected because a symlink spelling was persisted while callers were realpath-normalized. Final judgment: pass, because af070b8 now feeds resolved Git root_realpath into persistence and fingerprinting, and a pre-fix-sensitive fixture proves both alias and canonical control surfaces across reads and mutations.

Initial regression concern: restricting --repair-linked-copy could silently alter legacy execute paths. Final judgment: pass, because the Architecture/Spec define a typed rejection for this newly introduced option, the check precedes every non-watch dispatch, all documented execute subcommands and human/JSON outputs are covered, help scopes the option to watch, and the current-head full suite is green.
Initial evidence concern: review reuse metadata is stale. Final judgment: pass only after independent current-head inspection plus a fresh focused run and verification artifacts bound to af070b8.

resolved_findings.detail: Resolved at af070b8: managed binding persistence now uses the resolved source Git root rather than the legacy symlink spelling, so canonical caller comparison and source_fallback fingerprint reconstruction share one identity representation.
